Subscription Plan

Free

Starter plan for new vendors

  • WhatsApp purchase link
  • 10 products max
  • 1 image per product
  • Basic support

Basic (₦3,000)

For growing vendors

  • WhatsApp purchase link
  • Payment gateway (Online Payment)
  • Unlimited Products
  • Up to 5 images per product
  • Standard support
